I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through both fixes:

**Fix 1**: `TextVariants` is removed, should be replaced with `ContentVariants`. The member mappings show `p -> p`, so `TextVariants.p` becomes `ContentVariants.p`. Need to update the import and usage.

**Fix 2**: `Text` component should be replaced with `Content`. The props (`component`, `className`, `children`) map directly to the same names on `Content`.

Looking at the file:
- Line 6: imports `Text` and `TextVariants` from `@patternfly/react-core`
- Line 70: `<Text className="text-muted" component={TextVariants.p}>` — uses `Text` with `component` and `className` props
- Line 74: `</Text>` closing tag

Changes needed:
1. In the import on line 6: Replace `Text` with `Content` and `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants`
2. On line 70: Replace `<Text` with `<Content` and `TextVariants.p` with `ContentVariants.p`
3. On line 74: Replace `</Text>` with `</Content>`

        {t(
          'Define an affinity rule. This rule will be added to the list of affinity rules applied to this workload.',

content.text: Let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct. All changes are applied cleanly.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Status | Details |
|-----|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** (TextVariants → ContentVariants) | ✅ Applied | Replaced `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in the import (line 6) and in the JSX `component` prop (line 70: `component={ContentVariants.p}`). The member mapping `p -> p` preserves the same variant value. |
| **Fix 2** (Text → Content) | ✅ Applied | Replaced `Text` with `Content` in the import (line 6) and in the JSX element (line 70 opening tag `<Content>`, line 74 closing tag `</Content>`). All props (`className`, `component`, `children`) map 1:1 to `Content`. |

Both fixes affected the same import line and JSX element, so they were applied together. The import was also reordered alphabetically (`Content, ContentVariants, Divider, Form`). No other references to `Text` or `TextVariants` existed in the file, so no additional cleanup was needed.
